package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_handler_accepts_more_than_one_body_contract: Handlers that try to bind or manually parse multiple body DTOs in one request path.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule040NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule040NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule040NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario040Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule040NegativeService, input Rule040NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
